coverage_rule: Every Markdown heading and every numbered principle in the canonical document must appear in order with repo artifacts or an explicit boundary. This proves traceability, not full live production readiness.
completion_claim_rule: Do not claim the whole factory is end-to-end production-ready from this audit alone; a live pilot receipt from raw input through release/block is still required.

checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Track the canonical identity, vocabulary and source-of-truth framing.
checkpoints.boundary: This checkpoint is identity, definition or explanatory frame; it is traced, not treated as a standalone runtime gate.

checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Track every numbered principle as an explicit checkpoint below this section.
Principle 1: Source must precede opinion. Source text: Fonte antes de opiniao.
Principle 2: Expected outcome must precede planning. Source text: Resultado antes de plano.

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 3: Discovery antes de tratar paper como verdade.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 3: Discovery must precede treating a paper as truth. Source text: Discovery antes de tratar paper como verdade.

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 4: Metodo certo antes de execucao.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 4: Method routing must precede execution. Source text: Metodo certo antes de execucao.

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 5: Desenvolvimento organizado antes de worker solto.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 5: Development must be organized before workers run. Source text: Desenvolvimento organizado antes de worker solto.

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 6: Experiencia de produto antes de chamar interface de pronta.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 6: Product experience must be validated before a surface is called ready. Source text: Experiencia de produto antes de chamar interface de pronta.

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 7: Dados e metricas antes de dizer que deu certo.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 7: Data and metrics must exist before success is claimed. Source text: Dados e metricas antes de dizer que deu certo.

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 8: Seguranca arquitetural antes de construir.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 8: Security architecture must precede material build. Source text: Seguranca arquitetural antes de construir.

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 9: Dependencias explicitas antes de integrar.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 9: Dependencies must be explicit before integration. Source text: Dependencias explicitas antes de integrar.

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 10: Acessos e capacidades concedidos antes de execucao material.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 10: Access and capability must be ready before material execution. Source text: Acessos e capacidades concedidos antes de execucao material.

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 11: Custo e limite antes de execucao cara ou remota.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 11: Cost and budget limits must precede expensive or remote execution. Source text: Custo e limite antes de execucao cara ou remota.

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 12: Autoridade explicita antes de acao material.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 12: Authority must be explicit before material action. Source text: Autoridade explicita antes de acao material.

implementation_refs.covers: identity separation and approval evidence blockers

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 13: Privacidade, compliance e seguranca durante o processo, nao so no final.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 13: Privacy, compliance and security must run through the process. Source text: Privacidade, compliance e seguranca durante o processo, nao so no final.

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 14: Evals antes de confiar em agente, skill, prompt ou modelo importante.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 14: Important agents, skills, prompts and models need evals. Source text: Evals antes de confiar em agente, skill, prompt ou modelo importante.
Principle 15: Proof must precede done. Source text: Prova antes de done.

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 16: Revisao independente antes de confiar.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 16: Independent review must precede trust. Source text: Revisao independente antes de confiar.

implementation_refs.covers: identity separation and approval evidence blockers

checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 17: Humans decide material risk. Source text: Humano decide risco material.

implementation_refs.covers: identity separation and approval evidence blockers

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 18: Release exige owner, rollback, monitoramento e canal claro.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 18: Release requires owner, rollback, monitoring and clear channel. Source text: Release exige owner, rollback, monitoramento e canal claro.
checkpoints.boundary: Public-safe artifacts prove the bounded path named here; they do not prove every private/live production path.

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 19: Incidente vira aprendizado, teste, policy, skill ou doc.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 19: Incidents must become learning artifacts. Source text: Incidente vira aprendizado, teste, policy, skill ou doc.

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 20: A propria fabrica e auditada para nao depender de alguem lembrar lacunas.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 20: The factory must audit itself for blind spots. Source text: A propria fabrica e auditada para nao depender de alguem lembrar lacunas.

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 21: Interface humana nao substitui estado duravel.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 21: Human interfaces cannot replace durable state. Source text: Interface humana nao substitui estado duravel.
checkpoints.boundary: Public-safe artifacts prove the bounded path named here; they do not prove every private/live production path.

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 22: Discord mostra a fabrica; Hermes registra a verdade.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 22: Discord displays the factory; Hermes records truth. Source text: Discord mostra a fabrica; Hermes registra a verdade.
checkpoints.boundary: Public-safe artifacts prove the bounded path named here; they do not prove every private/live production path.

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 23: the operator conversa com uma voz oficial da fabrica, nao com todos os workers.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 23: The user talks to the official factory concierge, not every worker. Source text: the operator conversa com uma voz oficial da fabrica, nao com todos os workers.
checkpoints.boundary: Public-safe artifacts prove the bounded path named here; they do not prove every private/live production path.

checkpoints.canonical_heading: Principle 24: Toda aprovacao humana feita por interface precisa virar evento duravel.
checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Principle 24: Human approvals made in an interface must become durable events. Source text: Toda aprovacao humana feita por interface precisa virar evento duravel.

checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Preserve the canonical factory sequence as a traceable implementation map.
Kernel rules, states, risk, authority and validation must have executable checks.
Outcome and discovery must be structured before planning.
Product and surface packs must declare capability coverage and block unsupported work.
The selected method must declare required artifacts, gates, workers and reviewers.
Software work must be decomposed into plans, graph, units and loop controls.
Product-facing work must route through Product Experience OS and Product Face proof.
Data, metrics, analytics, logs and alerts must be specified before success claims.
Agents, prompts, models and skills need explicit eval plans/results.
Production operations, monitoring and support must have owner, health, rollback and incident paths.
checkpoints.boundary: Public-safe artifacts prove the bounded path named here; they do not prove every private/live production path.

checkpoints.canonical_obligation: Dependencies, access/capability and budgets must be explicit blockers before material work.
Compliance and privacy requirements must be planned and public-safe.
Dependencies, access/capability and budgets must be explicit blockers before material work.
The factory must use a runtime adapter instead of loose chat execution.
Evidence, worker results, verification, receipts and audits must block false done.
Security architecture and specialist routing must precede material risk.
